ACKS-CONTENT.Title: ACKS II — Content Streamer (PoC)
ACKS-CONTENT.ui.connectNote: The file is read locally in this browser only — nothing is uploaded, stored in the world, or sent to other players.
ACKS-CONTENT.ui.auditTitle: PdfText audit — the two language options
ACKS-CONTENT.ui.auditIntro: A is the persisted text every seat always has: a sparse stub plus page reference. B is the same entry as the @PdfText tag, resolved per viewing seat: with the book connected it offers "Show book text" (reproduction on demand); without it, B collapses to exactly A. Only tags and stubs are ever stored.
ACKS-CONTENT.pdftext.mm.griffon: Monster — Griffon. Full entry: ACKS II Monstrous Manual, PDF p. 171. Connect your PDF (acksContent.connectBook) to read it here.
ACKS-CONTENT.pdftext.prof.combatReflexes: Proficiency — Combat Reflexes. Full text: ACKS II Revised Rulebook, PDF p. 110. Connect your PDF to read it here.
ACKS-CONTENT.pdftext.prof.blindFighting: Proficiency — Blind Fighting. Full text: ACKS II Revised Rulebook, PDF p. 110. Connect your PDF to read it here.
ACKS-CONTENT.pdftext.prof.berserkergang: Proficiency — Berserkergang. Full text: ACKS II Revised Rulebook, PDF p. 110. Connect your PDF to read it here.
ACKS-CONTENT.pdftext.prof.combatFerocity: Proficiency — Combat Ferocity. Full text: ACKS II Revised Rulebook, PDF p. 110. Connect your PDF to read it here.
ACKS-CONTENT.pdftext.item.grapplingHook: Equipment — Grappling Hook. Full description: ACKS II Revised Rulebook, PDF p. 145. Connect your PDF to read it here.
ACKS-CONTENT.pdftext.item.herbWolfsbane: Equipment — Herb, Wolfsbane. Full description: ACKS II Revised Rulebook, PDF p. 145. Connect your PDF to read it here.

ACKS-CONTENT.pdftext.fake.shadowCant: Proficiency — Shadow Cant. Full text: ACKS II Codex of Whispers, PDF p. 42. NOTE: this book is an intentional PoC fake — no such PDF exists, so this stub is what every seat sees, permanently.
ACKS-CONTENT.pdftext.fake.whisperglass: Equipment — Whisperglass Vial. Full description: ACKS II Codex of Whispers, PDF p. 77. NOTE: this book is an intentional PoC fake — no such PDF exists, so this stub is what every seat sees, permanently.
